questions.label: a)
questions.rawText: Find the equation of the line passing through the points ( 2 , 3 ) and ( 6 , 7 )

questions.label: b)
questions.rawText: Find the equation of the line passing through the points (-3 ,-1 ) and ( 5 , 3 )

questions.label: b)
questions.rawText: The line passes through (-1 , 2 ) and (4,3). Write the equation of the line and find 3 other points in the line.

questions.label: a)
questions.rawText: The equation of a line is y=2x+1. List 10 points that lie on this line.

questions.label: b)
questions.rawText: The equation of a line is y=-{\frac{3}{2}}x+4. List 10 points that satisfy this equation.

topics.title: Finding equation and points of a line passing through two given points

questions.rawText: Write the equation of the line and find 3 other points in the line.
